top_signals.title: Nvidia's next-gen AI rack system delayed to 2028 on manufacturing snags, SemiAnalysis says
top_signals.summary: The reported delay adds to concerns that Nvidia's breakneck annual release cadence is colliding with manufacturing limits.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Citadel Securities Asks to Join Susquehanna Insider-Trading Suit
top_signals.summary: Citadel Securities LLC said it was the victim of the same alleged insider-trading scheme that rival Susquehanna International Group claims made more than $100 million on options bets placed ahead of a Chinese regulatory crackdown.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Seatrium Powers First Electricity Export to Singapore Grid from Floating Platform
top_signals.summary: Seatrium Limited has announced that it has achieved the first export of electricity to the Singapore national grid from its Floating Living Lab (FLL), marking a step forward in next-generation floating energy infrastructure.The FLL is a world-first…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan's DOGE struggles to find big-ticket cuts as ministries dig in
Ripple secures full MiCA CASP authorization for crypto services across 30 EEA countries
top_signals.summary: Ripple secured full MiCA CASP authorization from Luxembourg for regulated crypto services across all 30 European Economic Area countries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Kenporen seeks medical insurance reform talks
top_signals.summary: Japan should engage in discussions involving all stakeholders on whether and how to revise its public medical insurance system, deputy head Takashi Yonekawa said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: India's Power Demand Set to Grow 6% a Year Through 2030
top_signals.summary: Power demand in India is expected to rise by about 6% every year over the next four-five years, with growth supported by renewable energy capacity additions, brokerage Centrum Institutional Research said in a report on the Indian power sector. “Power demand is expected to grow at 6% pa as we expect renewable capacity additions to continue in the range 45-50 GW per year over next 4-5 years,” Indian media quoted the report as saying. During April and May, the first two months of the 2026/2027 fiscal year, India installed 6.8 gigawatts…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Launch of UK's National Cyber Action Plan delayed amid Labour leadership crisis
top_signals.summary: The plan had been due for publication on Monday, the sources said. It has been postponed amid the uncertainty over the governing Labour Party’s leadership contest, which opens July 9.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Teen suspect in Scattered Spider hacks is extradited to US
top_signals.summary: A complaint unsealed this week accuses a 19-year-old of participating in incidents including a breach of a "luxury-jewelry retailer" in 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Severe Storms Leave More Than 620,000 U.S. Customers Without Power
top_signals.summary: Severe storms have left more than 620,000 customers in the United States without power as of late on Sunday amid extreme weather in several states in recent days, with up to 2% of customers without electricity in some areas. More than 623,000 customers across Pennsylvania, Michigan, New York, New Jersey, Maryland, Connecticut, Virginia, and Texas were out of power as of Sunday night, according to PowerOutage.com, which tracks live power outages in the United States. Michigan and Pennsylvania had the highest share of customers out of power, at 2%…
